instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy the brother,
output: Pablo, apóstol de Cristo Jesús por la voluntad de Dios, y el hermano Timoteo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To the saints in Colossae and faithful brothers in Christ: Grace to you and peace from God our Father.
output: a los santos que están en Colosas, fieles hermanos en Cristo: Gracia y paz sean a vosotros, de Dios nuestro Padre.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: We give thanks to God, the Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, praying always concerning you,
output: Siempre orando por vosotros, damos gracias a Dios, Padre de nuestro Señor Jesucristo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because we have heard of your faith in Christ Jesus and the love which you have unto all the saints
output: habiendo oído de vuestra fe en Cristo Jesús, y del amor que tenéis a todos los santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because of the hope laid up for you in the heavens, of which you heard before in the word of the truth of the gospel,
output: a causa de la esperanza que os está guardada en los cielos, de la cual antes oísteis en la palabra de la verdad del evangelio,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Which has come to you, even as it is also in all the world, bearing fruit and growing, as also in you, since the day you heard and knew the grace of God in truth;
output: que ha llegado hasta vosotros, así como a todo el mundo, y lleva fruto y crece también en vosotros, desde el día que oísteis y conocisteis la gracia de Dios en verdad,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Even as you learned from Epaphras, our beloved fellow slave, who is a faithful minister of Christ on your behalf,
output: como lo habéis aprendido de Epafras, nuestro consiervo amado, que es un fiel ministro de Cristo a favor vuestro,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who also has made known to us your love in the Spirit.
output: quien también nos hizo saber vuestro amor en el Espíritu.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Therefore we also, since the day we heard of it, do not cease praying and asking on your behalf that you may be filled with the full knowledge of His will in all spiritual wisdom and understanding,
output: Por lo cual también nosotros, desde el día que lo oímos, no cesamos de orar por vosotros, y de pedir que seáis llenos del pleno conocimiento de Su voluntad en toda sabiduría y entendimiento espirituales,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To walk worthily of the Lord to please Him in all things, bearing fruit in every good work and growing by the full knowledge of God,
output: para que andéis como es digno del Señor, agradándole en todo, llevando fruto en toda buena obra, y creciendo por el pleno conocimiento de Dios;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Being empowered with all power, according to the might of His glory, unto all endurance and long-suffering with joy,
output: fortalecidos con todo poder, conforme a la potencia de Su gloria, para toda perseverancia y longanimidad con gozo,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Giving thanks to the Father, who has qualified you for a share of the allotted portion of the saints in the light;
output: dando gracias al Padre que os hizo aptos para participar de la porción de los santos en la luz;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who delivered us out of the authority of darkness and transferred us into the kingdom of the Son of His love,
output: el cual nos ha librado de la autoridad de las tinieblas, y trasladado al reino del Hijo de Su amor,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: In whom we have redemption, the forgiveness of sins;
output: en quien tenemos redención, el perdón de pecados.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Who is the image of the invisible God, the Firstborn of all creation,
output: Él es la imagen del Dios invisible, el Primogénito de toda creación.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Because in Him all things were created, in the heavens and on the earth, the visible and the invisible, whether thrones or lordships or rulers or authorities; all things have been created through Him and unto Him.
output: Porque en Él fueron creadas todas las cosas, las que hay en los cielos y las que hay en la tierra, visibles e invisibles; sean tronos, sean señoríos, sean principados, sean autoridades; todo fue creado por medio de Él y para Él.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He is before all things, and all things cohere in Him;
output: Y Él es antes de todas las cosas, y todas las cosas en Él se conservan unidas;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And He is the Head of the Body, the church; He is the beginning, the Firstborn from the dead, that He Himself might have the first place in all things;
output: y Él es la Cabeza del Cuerpo que es la iglesia; Él es el principio, el Primogénito de entre los muertos, para que en todo Él tenga la preeminencia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For in Him all the fullness was pleased to dwell
output: por cuanto agradó a toda la plenitud habitar en Él,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And through Him to reconcile all things to Himself, having made peace through the blood of His cross — through Him, whether the things on the earth or the things in the heavens.
output: y por medio de Él reconciliar consigo todas las cosas, así las que están en la tierra como las que están en los cielos, haciendo la paz mediante la sangre de Su cruz.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: And you, though once alienated and enemies in your mind because of your evil works,
output: Y a vosotros también, aunque erais en otro tiempo extraños y enemigos en vuestra mente por vuestras malas obras,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: He now has reconciled in the body of His flesh through death, to present you holy and without blemish and without reproach before Him;
output: ahora Él os ha reconciliado en Su cuerpo de carne, por medio de la muerte, para presentaros santos y sin mancha e irreprensibles delante de Él;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: If indeed you continue in the faith, grounded and steadfast and not being moved away from the hope of the gospel, which you heard, which was proclaimed in all creation under heaven, of which I Paul became a minister.
output: si en verdad permanecéis fundados y firmes en la fe, y sin dejaros mover de la esperanza del evangelio que habéis oído, el cual se proclamó en toda la creación que está debajo del cielo; del cual yo Pablo fui hecho ministro.

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: I now rejoice in my sufferings on your behalf and fill up on my part that which is lacking of the afflictions of Christ in my flesh for His Body, which is the church;
output: Ahora me gozo en lo que padezco por vosotros, y de mi parte completo en mi carne lo que falta de las aflicciones de Cristo por Su Cuerpo, que es la iglesia;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Of which I became a minister according to the stewardship of God, which was given to me for you, to complete the word of God,
output: de la cual fui hecho ministro, según la mayordomía de Dios que me fue dada para con vosotros, para completar la palabra de Dios,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: The mystery which has been hidden from the ages and from the generations but now has been manifested to His saints;
output: el misterio que había estado oculto desde los siglos y desde las generaciones, pero que ahora ha sido manifestado a Sus santos,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: To whom God willed to make known what are the riches of the glory of this mystery among the Gentiles, which is Christ in you, the hope of glory,
output: a quienes Dios quiso dar a conocer las riquezas de la gloria de este misterio entre los gentiles; que es Cristo en vosotros, la esperanza de gloria,

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: Whom we announce, admonishing every man and teaching every man in all wisdom that we may present every man full-grown in Christ;
output: a quien anunciamos, amonestando a todo hombre, y enseñando a todo hombre en toda sabiduría, a fin de presentar perfecto en Cristo a todo hombre;

instruction: Translate the following verse into Spanish in a strictly literal and faithful manner, preserving structure and terminology.
input: For which also I labor, struggling according to His operation which operates in me in power.
output: para lo cual también trabajo, luchando según la operación de Él, la cual actúa en mí con poder.
